name: Pineapple and Cucumber Salad- Midsummer Thai Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the seedless cucumber lengthwise into quarters.
2. Slice each quarter into 1/4-inch slices.
3. Peel the fresh pineapple and cut into quarters. Remove the core from each quarter.
4. Cut each quarter in half and slice into 1/2-inch slices.
5. Cut the red onion in half and thinly slice each half.
6. Separate the thick stalks from the watercress leaves.
7. In a bowl, combine cucumber, pineapple, onion, and watercress leaves.
8. In another bowl, whisk together lemon juice, soy sauce, sugar, and chili sauce (or dried chili flakes).
9. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss until well combined.
10. Serve on a platter.
